description: Rise of Avalon Patch 11 — Economic adjustments, combat balance changes, and multiple fixes.

sections.heading: Season 10 Winner Statue
items: Statue honoring Guild Season 10 winners Black 0rder added to Conquerors' Hall
sections.searchable_text: Season 10 statue Black 0rder Conquerors Hall cities

sections.heading: New Vanity Skins
items: Mage Adventurer Bundle added to store
Miststalker Swiftclaw Skin added to store
sections.searchable_text: vanity skins mage adventurer bundle miststalker swiftclaw

sections.heading: Economic Changes
sections.description: Adjustments to reduce Silver influx and stabilize economy.
sections.searchable_text: economic changes silver influx hardcore expeditions satchels randomized dungeons

changes.raw_text: Loot and Silver rewards reduced for expeditions above level 7 (~25% overall reduction, higher levels affected more)

subsections.heading: Satchels of Insight
subsections.searchable_text: satchels of insight tomes value reverted drop chances adjusted

changes.raw_text: Item value of Tomes of Insight reverted due to excessive Silver generation
Drop chances adjusted to match normal bags
Silver and loot rewards increased by about 10%

sections.heading: Changes
items: Corrupted Dungeon traps now scale damage with difficulty
sections.searchable_text: cluster cooldown corrupted dungeon traps scaling

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: combat balance axes frost staffs quarterstaffs

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: separator quarterstaff root duration aggro knockup

changes.raw_text: Now knocks up mobs in 6m radius for 0.9s
No longer generates top aggro when used on mobs

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed Smart Cluster Queue making players invisible and invulnerable
Black Market mail source now always correctly labeled
Fixed Fast Travel UI dropdown issue
Fixed Self Ignition overlapping damage issue
Goliath Horseeater web slow duration fixed
Disabled certain mounts in Crystal League matches
Fixed Royal Banner not buffing caster correctly
Fixed Boltcasters interaction with Purging Shield
[Mobile] Roads of Avalon portal tooltips now accessible
Various graphical, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes cluster queue black market fast travel self ignition mounts crystal league royal banner boltcasters mobile roads avalon
